agent_view.agent_description: Your AI assistant for Slack. Searches the web, writes and runs code, generates images, browses websites, manages reminders and scheduled tasks, and more.

suggested_prompts.title: Research with sources
suggested_prompts.message: Research the latest developments in AI agents. Compare at least three reliable sources and give me a concise briefing with links.

suggested_prompts.title: Build a useful file
suggested_prompts.message: Create a polished weekly planner as an HTML file, verify it in the sandbox, and upload it here.

suggested_prompts.title: Find Slack decisions
suggested_prompts.message: Search Slack for decisions made in the last seven days and summarize them with links to the original messages.

suggested_prompts.title: Schedule a check-in
suggested_prompts.message: Ask me for my timezone, then schedule a weekday 9 AM reminder to review my priorities.
